learning.concept: Logic is the process of decision making in code.
learning.explanation: Logic is what tells a program what to do if a certain condition is met. For example, if you have enough money, you can buy a game.

analogy.title: Hunger Switch
analogy.body:
Your brain uses logic for everything!

If you are hungry → eat food
Else → don’t eat

👉 This 'if/else' is the foundation of computer logic.

practice.a: If it rains, take an umbrella.
If your marks are above 40, you pass.
If red, stop | If green, go.
